mission.title: oauth2-proxy: Validate a session using the access token in the OIDC provider
mission.description: Another solution would be to validate the ID token only during the initial session creation and skip the validation after the refresh. This seems to be the case with versions < v7.2.0.

resolution.summary: Check IDToken expiration time, to see if token must be refreshed. Do not rely only in session age.
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
